action.reasoning: Observation: exprate ~0.070 (best 0.072, val peak 0.094) after 40 epochs; debug shows good simple cases (sqrt, simple eqs) but symbol/subscript errors, early stopping on long nums (e.g. only 5 zeros). Loss plateaus ~1.03. Analysis: core ResNet+spatial+attention is working (loss drop, basic structure learned); root causes were truncated/incomplete model.py (broken generate EOS logic) and train.py (incomplete loop/loss/metric logging); higher res, tuned aug/dropout/LR, complete code + resume will lift symbol accuracy and exact matches. Decision: supply FULL complete model.py (MathExprRecognizer wrapper, fixed per-sample EOS-aware generate excluding sos/eos, higher-res preprocess default=256x1664), FULL train.py (aligned CE loss on shifted targets, grad clip, AdamW+plateau on val_exprate, bs=12, aug+blur, resume best, 25 epochs, full jsonl logging per batch/epoch), update predict/debug.py to match new dropout=0.5 + params; run train+debug then submit_eval on best.pt (expect >0.08 test exprate).
